name: Alessa
description: Alessa offers an integrated AML platform with customer onboarding, transaction monitoring, sanctions and PEP screening, and regulatory reporting, tailored to banks, MSBs, casinos and fintechs.

seo.title: Alessa — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Alessa: Alessa offers an integrated AML platform with customer onboarding, transaction monitoring, sanctions and PEP screening, and regulatory reporting, tailor

when_to_use: Transaction monitoring rule deployment for MSB compliance
Automated SAR filing workflows for US FinCEN reporting
Customer risk scoring during AML onboarding for banks
Sanctions and PEP screening integrated with casino KYC
Ongoing monitoring alerts for politically exposed persons

pros: Unified onboarding, monitoring, screening and reporting
Vertical playbooks for MSBs, casinos and banks
Regulatory reports pre-built for FinCEN, FINTRAC
On-prem deployment option for regulated firms
cons: Heavy enterprise UI slows mid-market adoption
Implementation typically takes months, not weeks
Pricing opaque and negotiated per module
API-first fintechs may find it too platform-heavy
review.verdict: Full-stack AML suite for regulated banks and MSBs that want one vendor for the whole workflow.
review.best_for: Mid-to-large banks, MSBs and casinos needing end-to-end AML with regulatory reporting
review.not_for: Lean fintech teams wanting a lightweight screening API without a heavy platform
